_doc: Allowlist for the no-orphan-module probe (#85, T7 in the v0.15.0
rollout).  Modules listed here are intentionally not imported by
any production call site and are kept around as utilities or
fixtures.  Adding to this list requires a justification line.

no_orphan_module.vn_faker: Faker-style generator for Vietnamese test data; consumed only by tests + downstream demos.
no_orphan_module.vn_error_translator: VN-localised error message helper; consumed only by tests + downstream demos.
no_orphan_module.quality_gate: RRI-T 7×8 + RRI-UX 7×8 quality gate evaluator; public Python API consumed by /vibe-complete reports and downstream projects (audit P2 #6, v0.16.0-α).
no_orphan_module.tool_use_parser: Tolerant parser for ad-hoc tool-use JSON in LLM responses; public Python API consumed by orchestrators that don't go through query_loop (audit P2 #6, v0.16.0-α).
no_orphan_module.worktree_executor: Worktree fork primitive (Pattern #8 isolation); public Python API consumed by background-task runners and downstream projects (audit P2 #6, v0.16.0-α).
